content: APScheduler: a job saved to a PERSISTENT jobstore is serialized; the callable must be globally importable (module:function textual reference). Lambdas, bound methods, closures CANNOT be serialized ('reference to its callable could not be determined'). Constraint for the JobStore seam: a durable-jobstore impl forces callbacks to be top-level importable functions + only picklable kwargs — so the generic register(job_id,trigger,callback) seam must, for the durable path, take a textual ref or a registered-callable-key, not an arbitrary closure. In-memory MemoryJobStore has NO such constraint (today's impl).
